name: base-ci-self-test-fixture
description: Fixture exercised by .github/workflows/self-test.yml. Two postinstall-bearing packages: self-test-native-marker simulates a native dep (e.g. better-sqlite3) and is whitelisted via trustedDependencies — bun must run its postinstall under the v2026.4 model. self-test-marker is intentionally NOT in trustedDependencies — its postinstall must stay blocked, proving Shai-Hulud defense is preserved for everything outside the whitelist.
